ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening stock price */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest stock price */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest stock price */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing stock price */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of stocks traded */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing stock price */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link to the stock_symbols table */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company on that date */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield percentage */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date the query was made */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol queried */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the query range */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the query range */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the query */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of query (e.g., historical data, trend analysis, anomaly detection) */,
  "query_duration" REAL /* Duration of the query in seconds */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
